title: Trial Chamber Generation Adjustment: Eternal Starlight
description: This is a data pack that changes the generation of the vanilla Trial Chambers from the Overworld to Eternal Starlight dimension
body:
This is a data pack that changes the generation of the vanilla Trial Chambers from the Overworld to Eternal Starlight dimension, while also slightly reducing their spawn probability.The Trial Chamber will generate in the Crystallized Desert/Starlight Permafrost Forest/Starlight Forest/Dark Swamp/Scarlet Forest/Torreya Forest of the [Starlight Dimension].

这是一个数据包，作用是将原版试炼密室的生成由主世界更改为星光维度[永恒星光MOD]，并且稍微下降了一点生成概率。试炼密室会在[星光维度]的晶化沙漠/星光永冻森林/星光森林/黑暗沼泽/猩红森林/榧木森林中生成
